sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 13

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 13:1
items.html: (to the question) For the Rucha Kadma'a [first spirit] that emerged upon the discernments of MAN [Mayin Nukvin] of the Nukva's GE [Galgalta ve Eynaim] in the upper-upper is of the discernment of the Reshimot [records] of the Vav and the Nekuda [point] of the NHY [Netzah, Hod, Yesod] of AK [Adam Kadmon], extended to her by way of the NHY of AA [Arich Anpin] and by way of the NHY of ZA [Zeir Anpin]. But now, for the Gadlut, she needs the Reshimot of the discernment of the Masach [screen] of SAG by way of AVI [Aba ve Ima]; therefore she needs a new Zivug [coupling] of AVI. (Inner Observation, Item 13)
